data.body: Done (commit pending). prompt_authoring.py (list_prompts/prompt_write_target/save_prompt + PromptWriteError); atomic write (mkstemp+os.replace) via canonical writer; auto-detect packaged(nava-rebar checkout)/project/none; index regen on packaged write; non-happy paths (invalid id/collision/neither-writable). editor.py token-guarded GET /prompts, GET /prompt?id=, POST /prompt/save. Bundle: palette insertion (op→uses, prompt→prompt) + library dropdown + create/edit form, rebuilt. 285 unit + 1 browser e2e (Playwright, ran) green; backbone round-trip/non-happy verified directly.
